name: clean-code
description: Write readable, maintainable code through disciplined naming, small functions, and clean error handling. Use when the user mentions "code review", "naming conventions", "function too long", "code smells", "readable code", "boy scout rule", "single responsibility", "unit test quality", "my code is hard to read", "this function is a mess", "clean up this code", or "hard to maintain". Also trigger when reviewing pull requests for readability, untangling messy functions, debating comment styles, or
author: wondelai
